posts.author: chewonthat (Sadie McAdams)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Does anyone know if there is a way to disable notifications for a board? We have a board that we use to do a high level timeline and resource management and I want to be able to assign people to the board so I can pull their % of time on each project individually, but I don’t want them to get notified every time they are updated on the board.

Thanks!
